title: Implement ShootPredicate API (interface + ShootPredicateResult + register API)

reference_files.reason: System 10: ShootPredicate API - interface, ShootPredicateResult.success()/failure(reason), registration, execution order, framework registers 0 by default
Step 3: ShootPredicate execution in shooting timing - all registered predicates executed, any failure aborts

acceptance_criteria: ShootPredicate functional interface created with method test(Player player, ItemStack gun) returning ShootPredicateResult
ShootPredicateResult record/class created with static factory methods success() and failure(String reason)
ShootPredicateResult exposes isSuccess() boolean and getReason() String (reason null on success)
ModularShootAPI.registerShootPredicate(ShootPredicate) method added (or stub prepared if ModularShootAPI not yet created)
Internal registry maintains a list of registered ShootPredicate instances (framework registers 0 by default)
